summary: Added in-memory cache and debounced disk writes to MetaAwarenessTracker rollups
notes: TDD fix: MetaAwarenessTracker now holds rollups in _rollupCache, reads disk only on first access, and debounces writes via _scheduleFlush(). flushDebounceMs constructor option (default: 500). Public flush() method for process exit. Atomic rename pattern preserved in _flushNow(). 1 new test verifies debounce behavior. All 7 tests pass.
